Name: postgis_locations
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."postgis_locations" WHERE ST_DWithin("public"."postgis_locations"."geom", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($1), $2) AND ST_DWithin("public"."postgis_locations"."geog", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($3)::geography, $4, $5) AND ST_Contains("public"."postgis_locations"."area", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($6)) AND ST_Intersects("public"."postgis_locations"."geom", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($7)) AND ST_Equals("public"."postgis_locations"."geom", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($8)) ORDER BY "name" ASC) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
